title: Home
text:
This project develops a web-enabled visual analytics application using Shiny to explore customer structure, engagement, and retention patterns in a Colombian fintech dataset.


The project is organised into three modules:

Customer Overview & Segmentation
Customer Engagement & Experience
Retention Risk & Customer Value
